name: v2.1.81
body:
## What's Changed

- Added support for MCP resources with mime type image/png in conversations.
- Added /compact slash command now preserves pinned system prompts across compactions.
- [VSCode] Added inline diff viewer for agent edits.
- Breaking: Removed the deprecated --legacy flag. Use --output-format instead.
- Removed support for Python 3.10 in the official SDK.
- Fixed a bug where streaming responses could stall under heavy load.
- Fixed terminal rendering glitch on Windows Terminal.
- Improved Gemini tool call routing latency by 20%.
- Changed default context window for subagent to 200k tokens.
- Improved error messages for hook configuration parsing.
```
this block should be ignored
- Added this must not be picked up
```
